rows.label: qev018301_MSG0001
rows.name: Miranium! Miranium! Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Anyway, the development of Battle Data Probes
requires a massive amount of Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please! In order to create the next Battle Data Probe!
The Ranged Power Up Probe! Won't you provide me
with Miranium?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0004
rows.name:
At this rate, the precious Battle Data Probes will
fade away without ever seeing the light of day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0011
rows.name: Offer your cooperation.

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for details on what the
Miranium is used for.

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Thank you. I'm truly glad to have a collaborator
like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0006
rows.name:
The required amount of Miranium is 20000gm.
...How is it? Think you can do it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Depending on the processing, it can be turned into a
hard substance or a flexible substance like aluminum.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0008
rows.name:
It can't cover everything, but there is no other ore as
versatile as this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0009
rows.name: ...Now, go get 20000gm of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0010
rows.name: Let us revive the next Battle Data Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm sorry to always ask this. I know I'm requesting
an enormous amount.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0012
rows.name:
But... I'll show you that I can make something that will
reward that Miranium this time as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Normally, corporations should be investing in a
capable researcher like myself, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0014
rows.name:
It seems they still don't understand the value of
these Battle Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Without receiving your support like this, I wouldn't be
able to revive a single one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0016
rows.name: Hmph... It's an absurd story, but this is reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0017
rows.name: Well, I'm truly glad to have a collaborator like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Even though I surely hold the hope that will save the
BLADEs[ST:wide ]—no, this city, in my hands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0019
rows.name:
In the ridiculous reality of lacking materials, I cannot
give it form...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's an extremely absurd story...
Hey, haven't you gotten the Miranium yet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0030
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over 20000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Good! With this amount of Miranium, it looks like I can
start producing the Ranged Power Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0022
rows.name: Wait right there! I'll revive it right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0023
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—It's complete! I have finally accomplished it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0024
rows.name: This is the Ranged Power Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0025
rows.name:
If you install this at a Frontier Net Spot, you can
improve the ranged capabilities of those in the
surrounding area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Even an outstanding Doll wouldn't have the power to
change the battle situation this dramatically, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Make full use of this and annihilate the external enemies
attacking NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Right... Say, are you acquainted with a woman
named Kirsty?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0030
rows.name: I wonder what kind of person she is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0051
rows.name: State a favorable opinion about Kirsty.

rows.label: qev018301_JNK0060
rows.name: Criticism

rows.label: qev018301_SEL0061
rows.name: State a critical opinion about Kirsty.

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see... If she's that kind of person, she should be able
to understand the magnificence of this Battle Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0032
rows.name: Thank you. I think I'll go visit her in the near future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0033
rows.name:
To think she was such a troublesome person... However...
The reality is she's the only breakthrough right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0034
rows.name: It seems difficult, but I'll try visiting her once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0035
rows.name: ...Eh, what am I meeting her for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Thanks to the Miranium you've provided so far, I've
managed to continue development, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0037
rows.name:
As expected, for more large-scale development, the
cooperation of corporations and BLADE Headquarters
is absolutely essential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0038
rows.name:
So, I was thinking of having her, a Frontier Net pro with
strong connections to various corporations, put in a good
word for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0039
rows.name: Hmmm... I have no idea how it will turn out, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Well, I can only pray she has the eyes to discern
something excellent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0041
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Hm? What are you putting on airs for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Hurry up and let me start producing the
Battle Data Probe.[ST:wait ]
